summary: Tested Map Decorators feature - Backend API (13/13 tests passed) and Frontend UI (all decorator types, drag, hover controls, z-index verified). Feature is working correctly.

tests.name: Decorator toolbar visibility
tests.details: Toolbar hidden in normal mode, visible in edit mode

tests.name: All 5 decorator buttons
tests.details: hline, vline, rect, circle, text buttons all present

tests.name: Hover controls
tests.details: Delete button, color picker, resize handle visible on hover

tests.name: Z-index verification
tests.details: Decorators z-index=0, Tables z-index=1 (decorators behind tables)

tests.name: Decorators persist after exit edit
tests.details: Decorators remain visible after exiting edit mode

decorator_toolbar.details: Toolbar visible only in edit mode with 5 decorator type buttons

drag_functionality.details: Decorators can be dragged to new positions in edit mode

hover_controls.details: Delete (X), color picker (palette), resize handle visible on hover

z_index.details: Decorators z-index=0, Tables z-index=1 - decorators appear BEHIND tables

pointer_events.details: Decorators have pointer-events: none in normal mode - NOT clickable

persistence.details: Decorators persist after exiting edit mode and page refresh

context_for_next_testing_agent: Map Decorators feature fully tested and working. Backend endpoints: GET/POST /api/decorators, PUT/DELETE /api/decorators/{id}. Frontend: DecoratorToolbar component visible in edit mode, DraggableDecorator handles drag/resize/color/delete. Decorators stored per area_id with percentage-based positioning. Z-index verified: decorators (0) behind tables (1). Pointer-events: none in normal mode.
